title: Vehicle safety system and method
abstract: A vehicle safety system and method is provided for preventing heat related injuries in hot cars. The system includes a sensor, to sensing the presence of a child or animal in a stationary vehicle; and a controller, configured to issue an alert in response to the detection of the presence of the child or animal in the vehicle. The controller may also be for controlling a change in temperature in the vehicle in response to detection of the presence of the child or animal in the vehicle.
claims:
Claims 1. A vehicle safety system including: a sensor, to sense the presence of a child or animal in a stationary vehicle; and a controller, configured to issue an alert in in response to the detection of the presence of the child or animal in the vehicle. 2. The vehicle safety system of claim 1, wherein the controller is configured to controlling a change in temperature in the vehicle in response to the detection of the presence of the child or animal in the vehicle. 3. The vehicle safety system of claim 2, wherein the controller is configured to cause a temperate of the vehicle to decrease by activating a fan of the vehicle, activating air conditioning of the vehicle and/or opening a window of the vehicle. 4. The vehicle safety system of claim 1, wherein the controller is configured to cause the temperate of the vehicle to increase. 5. The vehicle safety system of claim 4, wherein the controller is configured to activate a heater of the vehicle or close a window of the vehicle. 6. The vehicle safety system of claim 1, including a temperature sensor, for sensing a temperature in the vehicle. 7. The vehicle safety system of claim 6, wherein the controller is configured to selectively increase or decrease the temperature in the vehicle based upon the temperature of the vehicle. 8. The vehicle safety system of claim 1, wherein the controller is configured activate an alarm or signaling device of the vehicle. 9. The vehicle safety system of claim 1, including a rechargeable battery, for powering the system, which is independent to a battery of the vehicle. 10. The vehicle safety system of claim 1, wherein the controller is configured to send a message to a remote device, based at least in part on the presence of the child or animal in the vehicle. 11. The vehicle safety system of claim 1, further including a positioning module, for determining a position of the vehicle. 12. The vehicle safety system of claim 11, wherein the position of the vehicle is sent in a message to a remote device. 13. The vehicle safety system of claim 1, wherein the controller is configured to send a first message when first threshold criteria are met, and a second message when second threshold criteria are met. 14. The vehicle safety system of claim 13, wherein the first message is sent to a registered user of the system, and the second message is sent to an alarm centre. 15. The vehicle safety system of claim 13, wherein the first and second threshold criteria comprise temperature thresholds from a temperature sensor of the system. 16. The vehicle safety system of claim 1, further including a camera, to capture images of an interior of vehicle. 17. The vehicle safety system of claim 1, wherein the sensor comprises a movement sensor. 18. The vehicle safety system of claim 1, wherein the sensor is configured to detect movement in several areas of the vehicle. 19. The vehicle safety system of claim 1, wherein the system is configured to determine a pattern of movement based upon sensor data. 20. The vehicle safety system of claim 1, wherein the system is configured to be placed on a front dash of the vehicle, and directed backwards toward an interior of the vehicle. 21. A vehicle safety method including: sensing, using a sensor in a stationary vehicle, the presence of a child or animal in the vehicle; and issuing an alert in in response to the detection of the presence of the child or animal in the vehicle. 22. The method of claim 21, further including sensing a temperature in the vehicle. 23. The method of claim 21, including activating an alarm associated with the vehicle. 24. The method of claim 21, further including sending a message to a remote device, based at 

 least in part on the presence of the child or animal in the vehicle. 25. The method of claim 24, further including determining a position of the vehicle, and providing the position in the message to the remote device. 26. The method of claim 21, including sending a first message when first threshold criteria are met, and a second message when second threshold criteria are met. 27. The method of claim 26, wherein the first message is sent to a registered user of the system, and the second message may be sent to an alarm centre. 28. The method of claim 21, further including capturing images of an interior of vehicle. 29. The method of claim 21, further including controlling, using a controller, a change in temperature in the vehicle in response to the detect of the presence of the child or animal in the vehicle.
